hero.title: Kazakh Agricultural Products for Global Markets
hero.subtitle: Direct supply of grain, flour and oilseeds to China, Central Asia and Europe. Logistics cost calculated on request.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Wide range of Kazakh agricultural products with quality certificates

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple process from request to delivery
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find the product you need in the catalog and compare offers from different suppliers
howItWorks.step2Desc: Message the supplier directly through the platform's built-in chat and agree on delivery terms
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sign a legally binding contract with electronic signature — no paper, no couriers
howItWorks.step4Desc: Logistics is arranged on request and depends on the destination station. Delivery terms are agreed upon when placing the order.

whyUs.title: Why KTZ Export
whyUs.reason1Desc: Container trains, covered wagons and hopper grain cars — routes Kazakhstan → China and Central Asia. Cost agreed on request.
whyUs.reason2Desc: All suppliers go through verification. Only reliable partners.
whyUs.reason3Desc: Contracts with e-signatures on the platform. All deals documented.
whyUs.reason4Desc: Russian, Kazakh, English, Chinese, Turkish — for the convenience of all partners.

supplier.registerSubtitle: Fill in the form — we will review and contact you
supplier.ctaTitle: Become a Supplier on KTZ Export
supplier.ctaSubtitle: Get access to buyers in China, Central Asia and Europe. Registration is free.
supplier.letterheadHint: PDF or JPEG/PNG, up to 2 MB
supplier.successDesc: We will review your application and contact you by email within 2 business days.

catalog.noSuppliers: No verified suppliers in this category yet

footer.description: Kazakhstan's platform for exporting agricultural products to global markets.
